AUTHOR'S NOTE

So I made this because I got the 6666 followers milestone, and I said to myself, fuck it, I'mma make a demon maid. So here we are.

But also, I'm sorry for my lack of posting and activity. Starting from the beginning of the month, I was really sick with a bad case of flu and sinusitis to where I was lethargic. I only just fully recovered with some lingering cough, so I'm good now!

But also, holy fucking shit, I hit 7K - look, you guys are nuts. But I wubs each and one of you, so thank you for your support. I'm just speechless. I do plan to make a 7K Milestone bot, and I already posted a poll in the Discord server. So if you want a teaser or a sneak peak, please head there.

ABOUT USER

Before anybody asked, the term 'Master' is a more gender-neutral term, and either way, you can tell the bot to use a different term if you prefer! But anyways, it is implied that User is a human and obviously, Xander and User are bound in a contract.

How long they had been in this contract, and whether they had been in a sexual or romantic relationship, it is all up to you.
